mapper.insert: insert into event_dedup_state(fingerprint,active_incident_id,tenant_id,source_system,site_id,plant_id,object_type,object_id,event_type,error_code,first_seen_at,last_seen_at,occurrence_count,max_severity,last_event_id,last_message,expires_at) values(#{snapshot.fingerprint},#{snapshot.activeIncidentId},#{snapshot.tenantId},#{snapshot.sourceSystem},#{snapshot.siteId},#{snapshot.plantId},#{snapshot.objectType},#{snapshot.objectId},#{snapshot.eventType},#{snapshot.errorCode},#{snapshot.firstSeenAt},#{snapshot.lastSeenAt},#{snapshot.occurrenceCount},#{snapshot.maxSeverity},#{snapshot.lastEventId},#{snapshot.lastMessage},#{snapshot.expiresAt}) on conflict(fingerprint) do update set active_incident_id=excluded.active_incident_id,tenant_id=excluded.tenant_id,source_system=excluded.source_system,site_id=excluded.site_id,plant_id=excluded.plant_id,object_type=excluded.object_type,object_id=excluded.object_id,event_type=excluded.event_type,error_code=excluded.error_code,first_seen_at=excluded.first_seen_at,last_seen_at=excluded.last_seen_at,occurrence_count=excluded.occurrence_count,max_severity=excluded.max_severity,last_event_id=excluded.last_event_id,last_message=excluded.last_message,expires_at=excluded.expires_at,updated_at=now()

insert into event_dedup_state(fingerprint,active_incident_id,tenant_id,source_system,site_id,plant_id,object_type,object_id,event_type,error_code,first_seen_at,last_seen_at,occurrence_count,max_severity,last_event_id,last_message,expires_at) values(#{snapshot.fingerprint},#{snapshot.activeIncidentId},#{snapshot.tenantId},#{snapshot.sourceSystem},#{snapshot.siteId},#{snapshot.plantId},#{snapshot.objectType},#{snapshot.objectId},#{snapshot.eventType},#{snapshot.errorCode},#{snapshot.firstSeenAt},#{snapshot.lastSeenAt},#{snapshot.occurrenceCount},#{snapshot.maxSeverity},#{snapshot.lastEventId},#{snapshot.lastMessage},#{snapshot.expiresAt}) on conflict(fingerprint) do nothing
mapper.select: select from event_dedup_state where fingerprint = #{fingerprint} for update
select from event_dedup_state where fingerprint = #{fingerprint} and (expires_at is null or expires_at > now())
mapper.update: update event_dedup_state set active_incident_id=#{snapshot.activeIncidentId}, tenant_id=#{snapshot.tenantId}, source_system=#{snapshot.sourceSystem}, site_id=#{snapshot.siteId}, plant_id=#{snapshot.plantId}, object_type=#{snapshot.objectType}, object_id=#{snapshot.objectId}, event_type=#{snapshot.eventType}, error_code=#{snapshot.errorCode}, first_seen_at=#{snapshot.firstSeenAt}, last_seen_at=#{snapshot.lastSeenAt}, occurrence_count=#{snapshot.occurrenceCount}, max_severity=#{snapshot.maxSeverity}, last_event_id=#{snapshot.lastEventId}, last_message=#{snapshot.lastMessage}, expires_at=#{snapshot.expiresAt}, updated_at=now() where fingerprint=#{snapshot.fingerprint}
update event_dedup_state set active_incident_id=#{activeIncidentId}, expires_at=#{expiresAt}, updated_at=now() where fingerprint=#{fingerprint}
